name: Reflex Plus Kitten Food Aluminium Tray - Beef -Chunks in Jelly 100g
description: Reflex Plus Beef Chunks in Jelly Kitten Food in Aluminium Tray , fully-balanced, beef protein-containing kitten food carefully formulated by feline nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all kittens. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 8.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.5 Moisture (%) - 83 Crude Ash (%) - 2.0 Vitamin D3 - 250 IE/kg Vitamin E - 15 mg/kg Copper -?1.0 mg/kg Biotin - 20 ?g/kg Manganese -?1 mg/kg Zinc - 15 mg/kg Taurine - 445 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (beef 10% min.), Minerals, Inulin (0.1%). FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: Serve as many times as needed per day: 0-3? months - 150-300g per day; 4-5 months 300-400g per day, 6-10 months - 400g per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
